case_title: KWOK LEUNG SHUM VS. JAIME GUZMAN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SHUM, KWOK LEUNG AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, JAIME ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $0.00 SERVED FEB-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, JAIME
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHUM, KWOK LEUNG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUZMAN, JAIME PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
